text: I feel a sense of eager anticipation as I move through these carefully constructed environments. The empty chairs in the conference room invite contemplation: so much potential for thought, for discourse still to come. In the exhibit space, the bold "R+D" and the text surrounding me press me to reflect on the nature of human intelligence and creativity. Curious and reflective, I sense that both places are dedicated to the flourishing of ideas and shared understanding. I feel at once inspired and a little solitary, poised on the edge of engagement.
